title: Aurora Cannabis Files Full Year 2025 Results and Fourth Quarter Announcement
text: NewWire reports Aurora Cannabis full year fiscal 2025 results and Q4 2025 announcement. Fiscal 2025 summary: Record annual global medical cannabis net revenue $244.4 million (39% YoY growth). Record adjusted EBITDA $49.7 million (261% YoY growth). Positive free cash flow $9.9 million on annual basis. Strong cash position $185.3 million with debt-free cannabis operations. Q4 2025 quarter: Total net revenue $90.5 million (34% YoY growth). Medical cannabis revenue $67.8 million (48% YoY growth). International revenue more than doubled, representing 61% of global medical cannabis. Adjusted EBITDA $16.7 million (619% YoY growth). International performance: International markets exceeding expectations. Compounding growth rates in Germany, Australia, Poland, UK. Market expansion opportunities larger than previously anticipated. Medical margins expanding through mix improvement. Balance sheet: Strong liquidity supports strategic initiatives. Debt-free cannabis operations. Multiple acquisition options available. Free cash flow trajectory positive. Strategic outlook: Medical-first strategy validated through financial performance. International opportunity substantially larger than appreciated. Manufacturing certifications competitive advantage. Cost structure improvements continuing. Management commentary: CEO highlighted exceptional year performance. Record medical revenue and EBITDA demonstrate strategy execution. International expansion accelerating ahead of plan. Profitability path increasingly clear. Guidance: Q1 2026 expected slightly lower due to seasonal factors. Subsequent quarters expected to improve. Full year 2026 guidance $269-281 million medical cannabis revenue. Adjusted EBITDA $52-57 million.
